name: enCore Energy Corp.
business: enCore Energy Corp. extracts domestic uranium in the United States using in-situ recovery (ISR) technology and sells it to nuclear power plants. The company owns three licensed central processing plants in Texas and has uranium sales agreements with U.S. nuclear utilities. As of December 31, 2025, the company had executed fourteen uranium sales agreements to supply uranium to nuclear power plants in the United States.

exposures.sentence: The Company only utilizes the proven ISR technology to provide necessary fuel for the generation of clean, reliable, and carbon-free nuclear energy.

catalysts.event: File applications to amend RML RO3653 and for UIC permits for Upper Spring Creek Brown Expansion Project
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, the Company intends to file applications to amend the RML RO3653 to incorporate Upper Spring Creek Brown Expansion Project and file applications for Class III and Class I Underground Injection Control permits for Upper Spring Creek Brown Expansion Project.

catalysts.event: First modules and first half of IX train ready to operate upon final PAA receipt
catalysts.sentence: The first modules and the first half of the IX train will be ready to operate once the final PAA is received in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: 440 operable nuclear reactors world-wide required approximately 180 to 225 million pounds of U3O8 annually at full operation
tamClaims.sentence: According to the World Nuclear Association (WNA), as of September 2025, there were 440 operable nuclear reactors world-wide, which required approximately 180 to 225 million pounds of U3O8 annually at full operation.
